description: Load NeoDunggeunmo and prefer it before Bitburner's default monospaced font stack.
notes: v1 bundle default font stack replacement did not visibly affect the UI in user screenshot.
v2 adds index.html force CSS override for rendered UI verification.
v3 keeps NeoDunggeunmo first as the default full-UI font strategy; Monaco-only exception remains a future option.
v4 sets allowRemainingSource=true for the font stack replace because the target string intentionally contains the source font stack as fallback.
